title: Driver module
abstract: A driver module for actuating a tendon, the driver module comprising:
claims: 1. A driver module for actuating a tendon, the driver module comprising: a plurality of sliders, each of the sliders comprising a base portion, a tendon receiving portion and a body portion, the tendon receiving portion being spaced apart from the base portion and the body portion extends from the base portion to the tendon receiving portion, the module further comprising a slider receiving portion having a first end and a second end and engageable with the base portion of the slider such that the slider is moveably attachable to the slider receiving portion, wherein the body portion of each of the plurality of sliders further comprises an alignment portion, which is adapted to place the tendon receiving portions of the adjacent sliders to abut with or be close to each other.
